since_last: 42% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.64%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.04% · BTC -0.67% · Gold +0.94% · Nasdaq100 +0.37%. 42% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.64%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.64%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.66%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SNAP is the standout at -15.68%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +12.09%, AMAT +8.88%, ASML +6.30%, ARM +6.21%, LRCX +6.06%. Laggards: SNAP -15.68%, RXRX -5.44%, CRNC -5.20%, SOUN -4.84%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.44% at $193.35
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.44% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
